available.brief: Build a rate-limited API-key issuance service. Must use Redis for state, Postgres for durability, and AES-GCM + HKDF for record encryption. Ships via docker-compose.
available.name: design
available.title: Service design with infrastructure constraints

available.brief: Build a React + TypeScript page that lets an on-call engineer investigate a usage-events dataset — filterable/sortable table, aggregate visualization, detail view, URL-persisted state.
available.name: ui
available.title: Dataset visualization UI

available.brief: Answer a batch of 10,000 queries across three kinds (count, exists, range_count) against the 50,000-record jumbo dataset. Naive O(N×K) solutions will time out; preprocessed O(N+K) solutions finish in milliseconds.
available.name: algorithm
available.title: Algorithmic query engine

note: Challenges are free-floating. All challenges share the candidate's single 3-hour assessment clock — there are no per-challenge timers. Include your implementation under `challenges/<name>/` in the repo you submit via POST /api/v1/submit {"type":"repo","value":"..."}.
